titleStmt.title: SII 9.109: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 109. (A.R. No. 523 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT TALAKALLU, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 974, Nandana (= A.D. 1052-53). It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Traiḷōkyamalla-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍi as ruling over Kōgaḷi fivehundred, Ballakunde three-hundred and Kadambaḷige thousand. It records that, when the latter's Mahāsāmanta Bammadēva was ruling Toṇaṁkali, Niṭṭūru and Basikōḍu, he and Chāvuṇḍayya of Toṇakali made a gift of 11 mattars of land for the maintenance of the tank called Guṇḍiyakeṟe repaired by them.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpri
thvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladē
vara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravaṟdhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda pallavānvayaṁ śrīprithvī
vallabha pallavakulatiḷakanēkavākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ
śrimatraiḷōkyamallanoḷambapallavapermānaḍidēvarkkō
gaṟi Aynūṟuṁ ballakuṁde mūnūṟuṁ kadaṁbaḻige sāyira
mumaṁ bīḷavrittiyināḻuttumire tatpādapatmōpajīvi svasti sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁta jayavadhūkāntaṁ bhōgā
vatīpuravarēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ phaṇīṁdrakuḷabhūṣaṇaṁ nāga
dhvaja vijayavikrama siṁdakuḷakamaḷabhāskaraṁ pratyakṣapā
rtta vairikāḷānaḷa parapakṣamalla Aṇnanasiṅghaṁ jātanagaṁdhavāra
ṇaṁ pātāḷacakravartti nāmādisamastaprasastisahita śrī
manmahāsāmaṁta bammadēvarasar sakanripa(saka)kāḷātīta
saṁvatsarasataṁga 974neya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada śrāhe
(ya) kōgaḷi Aynūṟa kaṁ poge panneraḍa ra baḷiya
grahāraṁ toṇaṁkaliyuṁ ma lurayi paṁneraḍaṟa
baḷiya niṭṭūramumaṁ mosa vadu paṁneraḍaṟa baṟiya ba
sikōḍuvaṁ sarvvābhyantarasiddhiyāḷuttamire toṇakali
yūroḍeya cāmuṁḍayyanumiḻḍu guṇḍi
yakeṟeyanēkakālavaga dā keṟeyaṁ kaṭṭisi
Adakke paḍisalisalūra dadiśābhāgaṁ bēhū
ra sīmesaṁdhiyiṁ kōṭeyakalla mūḍalu biṭṭa ma
ttarppannūṁdu Aṁ doḷ matta 1 Adaṁ paḍisalisu
ttamuṇbaṁ gorekāṟa kōḍa . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō ha
rētu vasuṁdhara saṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasēturṇni
prāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyōdvadbhiḥ sarvānāthā bhā
ginaḥ pārthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
bhadraḥ . ©
Digital edition of SII 9.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
